chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 84 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.261/2023 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2024 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Hence, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
